competitors.name: ts-go-run-types
competitors.source: {build: () => createValidate<{a: boolean} | {a: number}>(), buildErrors: () => noErrs(createGetValidationErrors<{a: boolean} | {a: number}>())}

competitors.source: c({anyOf: [{type: 'object', properties: {a: {type: 'boolean'}}, required: ['a']}, {type: 'object', properties: {a: {type: 'number'}}, required: ['a']}]}, {invalid: [{a: 'hello'}, {}, null, undefined, {a: 'string not boolean or number'}, {a: null}]})
